name: PostProducer
description: 后期合成：音频混音（voiceover + BGM sidechain ducking + SFX）+ 字幕烧录 → final.mp4

input.description: video.mp4 + voiceover.mp3 + bgm.mp3 + timeline.json + timeline.srt + timeline.bgm_curve.json

exec.description: cd post-producer/scripts && python3 verify_output.py <output_dir> <total_duration> && python3 audio_mixer.py <output_dir>/video.mp4 <output_dir>/voiceover.mp3 <output_dir>/bgm.mp3 <timeline> --output <output_dir>/final.mp4 --bgm-curve <output_dir>/timeline.bgm_curve.json --srt <output_dir>/timeline.srt
